data.title: Corning's Angela Haneklau Named Inaugural Recipient of Graybar's WINGS Luminary Award
data.description: St. Louis, April 29, 2026 - Today, Graybar, a prominent distributor of electrical, industrial, automation, and connectivity products, revealed that Angela from Corning Incorporated (NYSE: GLW) will be joining their executive team. This move highlights Graybar's dedication to enhancing their supply chain management and logistics services.

data.title: Antigravity Releases Big Spring Update and Launches A1 in Mexico
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 29, 2026, Antigravity announced the launch of its highly anticipated Big Spring Update for the Antigravity A1 drone. This update brings significant enhancements to the drone's flight capabilities, safety features, and creative functionalities. Key features of the update comprise the introduction of a Voice Assistant, Timelapse option, and enhanced controls for users. These improvements aim to elevate the overall user experience and provide more innovative possibilities for drone enthusiasts.

data.title: Mountain Life Insurance Company Launches Its Multi-Year Guaranteed Annuity (MYGA) Products Through Hexure's FireLight Platform
data.description: In Lexington, Kentucky, on April 29, 2026, Mountain Life Insurance Company (MLIC), a rapidly expanding insurer of life and annuity plans nationwide, revealed the prosperous introduction of its Multi-Year Guaranteed Annuity (MYGA) products through Hexure's FireLight platform.

data.title: DOGE leads rally with 12% gains pre-FOMC. Possibility of price hitting $0.33. Resembles mid-2023 bounces.
data.description: Dogecoin has recently experienced a rebound similar to those observed in mid-2023, indicating a possibility of a rally towards $0.33 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: Morris County Historical Society Announces 2026 Pathways of History Spring Tour
data.description: The Morris County Historical Society has revealed the upcoming Pathways of History Spring Tour set to occur on May 2 and 3, 2026, from 11 AM to 4 PM each day. This marks the tour's 17th year and is an occasion eagerly anticipated by many. The event is free to attend and will take place in Morris County, New Jersey, offering a unique opportunity to explore the region's rich history.

data.title: Visa Boasts Biggest Revenue Beat In Four Years, Highest Share Buyback In Its History
data.description: Visa Inc's stock (NYSE: V) experienced a surge in early trading following the release of positive first-quarter results. Analyst insights reveal that Goldman Sachs maintained a Buy rating and raised the price target to $420, while JPMorgan reiterated a Buy rating with a price target of $400. Visa reported gross revenue of approximately $15.475 billion, marking a 16% increase year-on-year and surpassing consensus by 3%. The revenue beat was attributed to robust volume growth, higher revenue yields, and lower incentives. The company's strong performance in value-added services, particularly in network-oriented services, was highlighted as a key factor. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: What's Going On With Lemonade Stock Wednesday?
data.description: Lemonade, Inc. (NYSE: LMND) saw its shares decline after revealing their first-quarter fiscal 2026 results. The company reported a loss of 47 cents per share, which is less than the anticipated 58 cents per share loss. Their revenue totaled $258.0 million, surpassing estimates of $251.5 million, showing a 71% increase from the previous year due to increased gross earned premiums and enhanced premium retention. Adjusted gross profit spiked by 119% year over year to $100.8 million, attributed to higher revenue and an improved net loss ratio. The adjusted EBITDA loss narrowed down to $17.1 million from the previous quarter.

data.title: KalVista Scores $1.9 Billion Takeover Deal; Why A Key Rival Jumped Too
data.description: KalVista Pharmaceuticals experienced a significant surge in its stock price following an acquisition bid of $1.9 billion by Italy's Chiesi Group. The takeover offer resulted in a boost for KalVista's shares, with key competitor also reacting to the news.

data.title: Visa Stock Soars Because AI Agents Will Pay With Cards
data.description: Visa, a leading payment company, experienced its highest revenue growth in the second quarter since 2022. The surge in revenue has led to a significant increase in Visa's stock, with investors showing optimism towards the company's future prospects. The positive momentum is attributed to the integration of AI technology into their payment systems, which is expected to drive more transactions using cards. This advancement is seen as a pivotal strategy in enhancing user experience and expanding their market reach.

data.title: Bloom Energy Soars On Demand From AI Data Centers, Lifting Fuel-Cell Peers
data.description: Bloom Energy, a partner of Oracle, experienced a significant increase due to the growing demand for fuel-cell energy, particularly from AI data centers. This surge in demand has been beneficial not only to Bloom Energy but also to other companies operating in the fuel-cell industry. The performance of Bloom Energy reflects the expanding market for fuel-cell technology as AI data centers continue to multiply. This trend signifies a positive outlook for the sector as a whole, with Bloom Energy leading the way.

data.title: Hyundai Motor Group and Georgia Tech Sign MOU to Further Collaborate on Hydrogen Mobility Development
data.description: A long-term collaboration has been revealed between the Hyundai Motor Group and the Georgia Institute of Technology focusing on hydrogen mobility solutions. The partnership involves Hyundai Motor North America contributing four NEXO fuel cell electric SUVs, while the Hyundai Motor Group will provide support through a hydrogen electrolyzer project. This partnership aims to bring innovative technologies to the forefront and promote sustainable transportation.

data.title: Global Hydrocephalus Market is projected to reach USD 10.17 Billion by 2030
data.description: The market for hydrocephalus is witnessing growth due to the rise in neurological disorders incidence, technological advancements in shunt systems, and the increasing geriatric population. A report by Allied Market Research revealed these trends. This market analysis was published on April 29, 2026, in Portland, Oregon. The report, titled "Hydrocephalus Market by Cause," highlights significant numbers in the industry's growth trajectory.

data.title: Pro Cheer League Announces Two New Teams and Schedule Expansion
data.description: In its second season, the Pro Cheer League presented by Varsity Spirit is set to welcome two new teams, the Houston Hustle and Kentucky Crush. The upcoming season will see the number of matches doubled compared to the previous season. This league is the premier professional organization for elite cheer athletes aged 18 and above. The announcement was made today in Memphis, Tennessee on April 29, 2026.

data.title: FAIRMONT WATERFRONT ANNOUNCES MULTI-YEAR RENOVATION PLAN
data.description: Fairmont Waterfront in Vancouver, BC has successfully completed the first phase of its extensive renovation project as of April 29, 2026. The hotel is reimagining its Pure Coastal Luxury identity through this transformation. The renovation is part of a multi-year plan and this initial phase signifies a significant step forward. The hotel aims to enhance the guest experience and elevate its offerings.

data.title: Amazon Stock Hits All-Time High Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) shares surged to new highs as investors prepare for the upcoming first‑quarter earnings report. The stock is currently challenging resistance levels. The bullish momentum is fueled by UBS's reaffirmation of its positive outlook on Amazon, setting a price target of $304. UBS highlighted the significance of OpenAI's advanced models on Bedrock for Amazon Web Services (AWS), positioning it as a vital development for the company. This move builds on Amazon's prior investment and collaboration with OpenAI, indicating AWS's efforts to capture a larger portion of enterprise AI work. The integration of OpenAI's models expands AWS's reach in the AI market and underscores Amazon's commitment to making AI technology more accessible to diverse businesses, not just limited to software companies. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
